data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding bundle composition across product and service sellables.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for bundle composition across product and service sellables. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for bundle composition but lacks concrete evidence that this aspect has been validated in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of validation for bundle composition across product and service sellables.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
